steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence asserts that resins have “several important roles.” The blank introduces what comes next: a specific illustration of one of those roles.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”For example,” establishes that the following clause exemplifies the general claim just made.

The other three choices either signal contrast (however, regardless) or mere temporal sequence (next), none of which captures an explanatory or exemplifying relationship.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
